mapper.insert: INSERT INTO outbox (event_id, topic, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, payload, published) VALUES (#{eventId}, #{topic}, #{aggregateType}, #{aggregateId}, #{payload}, FALSE)
mapper.select: SELECT id, event_id, topic, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, payload, published, created_at, published_at FROM outbox WHERE published = FALSE ORDER BY id LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE outbox SET published = TRUE, published_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND published = FALSE
mapper.select: SELECT id, event_id, topic, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, payload, published, created_at, published_at FROM outbox ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
